items.headline: SpaceX stock gains, space companies fall, chips mixed on IPO news
items.summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma joins Market Domination to tackle today's top trending tickers, including the momentum driving SpaceX (SPCX) shares in Friday's session after the company's IPO, the impact it is having on other space stocks Virgin Galactic (SPCE) and Rocket Lab (RKLB), and how semiconductor stocks such as Micron Technology (MU) and Nvidia (NVDA) are moving on the historic public offering.

items.headline: Acquisition Odds: How These 4 Cult Stocks Stack Up as Buyout Targets
items.summary: Acquisition speculation is the lifeblood of cult-stock trading. The cleanest takeover targets share three traits: strategic value to a deep-pocketed partner, a cash runway that does not force a fire sale, and proprietary intellectual property that a giant cannot easily replicate.
